element_introduction_order.mastery_context: primary melee weapon, baseline combat tool
limited use panic button for overwhelming situations
core movement vocabulary established early, expanded throughout
resource management; lost on death, raising stakes
unique mechanical deviation; requires new input patterns

typical_tension_triggers: health meter low with no checkpoints ahead
loss of health power-ups on death
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: non-stop action rhythm; short stages with very few checkpoints create sustained tension; relief comes only through successful enemy elimination or reaching stage end; continuous pressure enforced by limited continues (7 max in Japanese version)

difficulty_curve.early_game: introduction of base sword, chain, shuriken weapons and core movement verbs (somersault, wall-jump, flying kick, slide, charge attack) in stage 1; enemy encounters relatively controlled to teach input patterns
difficulty_curve.mid_game: weapon variety fully available; enemy abundance and variety increase; platforming sequences become more demanding; magic attacks introduced as limited resource option
difficulty_curve.late_game: culmination against Koma clan complex; hovercraft Mode 7 stage introduces unique mechanical challenge; final encounters test mastery of all weapon types and traversal moves
notable_spikes: stage 1 completion threshold (all core mechanics must be internalized)
introduction of the unique hovercraft/Mode 7 stage (new input pattern, different spatial grammar)
final Koma clan complex stages (enemy variety and abundance peak)

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: short stage structure with minimal checkpoints
notable_level_patterns.description: stages are notably short but punishing; very few checkpoints per stage forces player to execute clean runs; failure resets entire stage, creating high-tension micro-sessions; loss of collected health power-ups on death raises stakes

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: linear side-scrolling progression with platforming focus
notable_level_patterns.description: all stages except one follow traditional left-to-right horizontal scrolling with integrated platforming; player advances through enemy encounters and traversal challenges in predictable spatial sequence

one stage breaks formula entirely with hovercraft riding and Mode 7 pseudo-3D visual effect; introduces entirely new input vocabulary and spatial perception; serves as pacing break and mechanical surprise
